'''wafïfshïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zaman|zaman]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-f-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zaman|zaman]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| wafïfshïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[paucal]] || wafïfshïfth || wafïfshïfj || wafïfshïfsh || wafïfshïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plentiful]] || wafïffïfshïfth || wafïffïfshïfj || wafïffïfshïfsh || wafïffïfshïf
|}

''8 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || wafïfshïfïf || wafïfshïfïf || wafïfshïfïf || wafïfshïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || wafïfshïfth || wafïfshïfj || wafïfshïfsh || wafïfshïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || wafïfshïfïfl || wafïfshïfïfl || wafïfshïfïfl || wafïfshïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || wafïfshïfïfïf || wafïfshïfïfïf || wafïfshïfïfïf || wafïfshïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || wafïfshïfïfn || wafïfshïfïfn || wafïfshïfïfn || wafïfshïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || wafïfshïfïforo || wafïfshïfïforo || wafïfshïfïforo || wafïfshïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|30312eb}}
